title: Define v8.0 Externalized Organization Runtime direction
description: Run the post-v7.9 runtime-backed direction review that selects the first bounded v8.0 implementation path for governed external actors, tools, providers, and references under explicit source-of-truth, permission, freshness, availability, approval, provenance, and not-proven boundaries.
triage_notes: v8.0 direction approved: first slice is external runtime resource contract, writer, audit, release-state integration, Mission Control projection, and self-hosting evidence.
